releases.title: Figma Community profiles redesigned for better showcase
releases.summary: Figma Community profiles have been redesigned to better showcase your work, process, and identity.

releases.title: Linear 2026.18 enables coding sessions with Linear Agent
releases.summary: Linear Agent can now write code using Claude Code and Codex, enabling users to triage, plan, review, and ship within Linear. This feature allows cloud-based coding sessions that pull in workspace context, and enables automation for investigating and fixing new issues. Dozens of bug fixes are also included across agents, diffs, editor, and more.
